nodes.name: Loten's sunbird
nodes.summary: Loten's sunbird（Loten's sunbird，学名 Cinnyris lotenius），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于Joan Gideon Loten。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Joan Gideon Loten
nodes.summary: Joan Gideon Loten是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Loten's sunbird，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Named after Joan Gideon Loten, who was the Dutch governor of colonial Ceylon, it is very similar to the purple sunbird that is found in the same areas and also tends to hover at flowers for nectar, but can be distinguished by the longer bill, the maroon band on the breast and brownish wings
